title: mentha × villosa var. dumortieri
intro: Mentha × villosa var. dumortieri, also known as mint or Mentha dumortieri, is a type of plant that belongs to the Lamiaceae family and is a hybrid of Mentha villosa and Mentha × verticillata. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating digestive issues and relieving headaches. The plant's health benefits include reducing nausea and vomiting, as well as providing relief from respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis. The herbal preparations of Mentha × villosa var. dumortieri include teas, essential oils, and topical creams that can be used to alleviate various health problems.
